code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0
mut has = false
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 10 or b == 9 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if string.len(cur) > 0
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if not has
          max_val = v
          min_val = v
          has = true
        else
          if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
          if v < min_val
            min_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
